## Market Microstructure

| Date | Title | Source | Key Concept | Teaching Skill |
|------|-------|--------|-------------|----------------|
| 2025-07-30 | Order Book Filtration and Directional Signal Extraction at High Frequency | arXiv:2507.22712v1 | Three-layer diagnostic framework (correlation, regime, Hawkes) for evaluating OBI filtration; Modification-Time Filter (MTF) most effective; Trade-based OBI ≫ book OBI for causal coherence | finance-strategies/order-book-filtration-oil |
| 2026-06-06 | DeFi Lending Liquidation Mechanisms: Fixed-Spread vs Auction-Based Price Impacts | Bank of Canada SWP 2025-12 (Tian & Zhu) | Auction-based liquidations (MakerDAO) produce 5x smaller price drops (0.01% vs 0.054%) by bidding up collateral prices; fixed-spread (Aave/Compound) benefits validators via gas wars; competition effect dominates entry effect when liquidator entry costs are low | finance-strategies/defi-lending-liquidation-mechanisms |
| 2026-06-06 | Funding Rate Trading: Post-Arbitrage Frontier — Exchange Selection, ADL Risk, and Pendle Stack | BitMEX Blog (State of Crypto Perps 2025 + sENA Arbitrage) | Passive delta-neutral carry collapsed to <4% APY in 2025; structural edge shifts to exchange selection (BitMEX 75% positive funding months vs Binance 19%); combining BitMEX short perp + Pendle PT sENA yields 22.8% APY; new frontier is funding rate volatility trading, not carry harvesting | finance-strategies/funding-rate-trading-post-arbitrage-frontier |
